name: Mavodelpar
summary: Mavodelpar is a PPAR-delta agonist normalized for STRIDE primary mitochondrial myopathy clinical-outcome evidence.
mechanism_summary: Activates PPAR-delta to alter mitochondrial and metabolic programs, with linked evidence bounded to mitochondrial-disease functional endpoints.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Mavodelpar STRIDE did not show a 12-minute walk advantage over placebo; STRIDE mavodelpar primary mitochondrial myopathy trial.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
